evidence.source_title: In All But Name: The Iranian Regime's (De Facto) Lobby in the West
evidence.description: Zarif told the Iranian parliament in August 2013 that Parsi and NIAC had been his 'main partners' in exploiting American political divisions on Iran policy.

evidence.source_title: Iranian Foreign Minister: NIAC Our Main Conduit
evidence.description: Zarif's parliamentary testimony explicitly named NIAC as the institutional vehicle through which he influenced U.S. policy debates.

editorial_notes: Institutional-level connection distinct from the Parsi-Zarif personal connection. Zarif's parliamentary testimony makes this an org-level relationship.
